subject: [RFC PATCH 32/40] mm: debug: prevent infinite recursion in dump_page() with CMA

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch prevents infinite recursion in the dump_page() function when dealing with Contiguous Memory Allocation (CMA). It does this by adding a guard to check if the page frame number is valid before resolving its zone and classifying it. This ensures that the function can safely report on pages without a meaningful zone, preventing the kernel from running out of stack due to recursive calls.
